sql_array: CREATE TABLE week_data (id INTEGER, week_interval INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO week_data (id, week_interval) VALUES (1, to_weeks(5));
UPDATE week_data SET week_interval = to_weeks(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, week_interval, week_interval * 2 AS double_weeks FROM week_data;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM CURRENT_DATE + week_interval) AS current_week FROM week_data;
